content.en:
The Infinite Heavenly Emperor was the only eightfold Supreme Dao realm existence in the Infinite Domain, and he had comprehended the rules of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao, and only he could have such terrifying strength.

Taisu Palace.

The Taisu Palace Lord received the message.

"The Infinite Heavenly Emperor is urging too much roulette!"

In such a dynamic and majestic invasion of the battlefield, if Taisu Palace didn't know yet, where would he be qualified to plan to overthrow Wuji Heavenly Palace!

"Who did the Infinite Heavenly Emperor attack?"

The Taisu Palace Lord was puzzled.

Immediately, she asked people to investigate.

......

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

After the Wuji Heavenly Emperor urged Taiyi to make a move, the backlash from the origin of heaven and earth came.

Click!

A crack opened in his heart, and a trail of blood flowed out, but he recovered quickly, and the backlash was nothing.

However, he frowned slightly.

"Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor, what's wrong?" asked the Sixth Heavenly Venerable.

"That Ye Tian, the main body is not dead!" "The Wuji Heavenly Emperor said with some disbelief: "The clone he left in other parts of the Wuji Domain was sensed and killed by me, but his body and even the clone left in the Wuji Domain did not die. "

"How can this be ????"

The Sixth Cry Tianzun was a little incredulous.

This is the Wuji Heavenly Emperor's move, can Ye Tian still live?

"Ye Tian has already comprehended the rules of the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao, and I can't kill him across the battlefield array and the Origin Realm. Although I can destroy the Origin Realm, I can endure some more Heaven and Earth Origin Retaliation. However, the battlefield array has been arranged, and it is difficult to remove it now, and it needs permission from there. "

Wuji Heavenly Emperor said helplessly.

"This ......"

Many of the Sevenfold Dao Realms were stunned, they never thought that this would happen!

"Lord Wuji Heavenly Emperor, what should I do now?"

Six Cry Tianzun asked.

Since he has already offended Ye Tian, he has to find a way to let Ye Tian fall, and he must not be given a chance to grow.

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor was silent for a while, and then immediately took out a set of mini array plates: "This is the Infinite Trapped Heaven Array, you let a sixfold peak Dao realm enter the battlefield, arrange it in the origin realm where he is, and block its origin realm. Then, I will pay an even greater price and kill his clones on the battlefield, so that he will only be left with his original body in the Origin Realm. Without resources, no matter how evil he is, he will not be able to grow up. "

It's the next step, but that's the only way to do it for now.

Once the Infinite Trapped Heaven Array is deployed, the Sixfold Peak to the Dao Realm will not be able to break through the Infinite Trapped Heaven Array, and the Taisu Palace will not be able to rescue Ye Tian at that time.

"Bai Ye, just go ahead!"

The Infinite Heavenly Emperor instructed.

"Yes!"

Venerable White Leaf replied.

Then, he took the Infinite Prison Heavenly Array to the battlefield.

Soon.

Venerable White Leaf came to the battlefield, and then headed towards the Origin Realm where Ye Tian was.

His speed was very fast, and it didn't take long for him to descend on the Origin Realm where Ye Tian was.

"Here again, damn Ye Tian, last time you snatched my Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit, you comprehended the seventh sequence of Supreme Dao rules, you must have used my Infinite Supreme Dao Fruit!!" Bai Ye was extremely resentful now.

If it weren't for Ye Tian, the person who comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of supreme dao would be him.

But now, he was able to block Ye Tian, and his mood would naturally become very good.

"Go!"

The Infinite Prison Array fell, instantly turning into an even more terrifying prison that covered the entire Origin Realm.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's gaze looked at the outside world, and he saw the White Leaf Venerable, and also saw the Infinite Prison Heaven Array.

He could sense the horror of this great array.

"The Wuji Heavenly Emperor can't kill me, this is to block the Origin Realm where I am located!" Ye Tian understood.

However, he still has a copy of his body left in the outside world.

"No, the Infinite Heavenly Emperor must know that I have other bodies, so he will definitely use the attack just now to kill my copy body!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The point is, any copy of his body will be killed.

Previously, his Supreme Dao Monster Replica Body was still obliterated by the rule power of the Infinite Heavenly Emperor.

It shows that the little induction between the reproducing bodies still can't hide the rule power of the Infinite Heavenly Emperor.

At that time, except for the Origin Realm, all other copies of his body will be wiped out.

"What a ruthless Infinite Heavenly Emperor!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

However, he did not panic.

Over the years, the countless resources he had obtained had been sent to the Origin Realm by him.

These resources were enough to improve his cultivation a lot, and even to impact the Triple Dao Realm.

If he broke through to the Triple Supreme Dao Realm and created the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, he might be able to break this formation and get out.

......

Emperor of Heaven.

He received a summons from Bai Ye and knew that the Infinite Prison Heavenly Array had been arranged, so he didn't hesitate anymore.

"Kill!"

He urged Taiyi Roulette again to kill Ye Tian's other clones, and strive to wipe out the other clones together.

Rumble!!!!

The power of the rules descended again, and they entered the battlefield of the True Dao Domain.

This time, Ye Tian's copy body was completely damaged, the kind that was about to fall.

However, the next moment, the Infinite Heavenly Emperor attacked again.

Click!

One of the replica bodies on the battlefield was still wiped out, and the seventh sequence of supreme rules still did not hold.

After killing again and again, Ye Tian was killed except for the true body copy body of the origin realm.

Of course, the backlash of the Infinite Heavenly Emperor was not good.

He immediately went to heal his wounds, and nothing else was involved.

......

Taisu Palace.

"Lord Taisu Palace, Ye Tian was killed by a terrifying force in Taisu Battle City, but I don't know if Ye Tian was killed by the main body or the clone!"

The Lord of Longqin Palace summoned him.

Tai Su frowned slightly, "She knows that Ye Tian has a clone, but this time it was the Wuji Heavenly Emperor who made a move, even if it was across the battlefield array and the Origin Realm, if there was no protection from the Seventh Sequence Supreme Dao Rule, even if she stayed in the Origin Realm, she would be bombarded and killed." "

She was worried that Ye Tian had completely fallen.

Immediately, she asked the Longqin Palace Master to go to the Origin Realm where Ye Tian was located to take a look.

It didn't take long for the Longqin Palace Lord to reply again.

"The Origin Realm is covered by a large array?"

She listened to the large array in the interrogation screen, and immediately recognized it.

"The Infinite Prison Heaven Array, this is the blockade array created by the Infinite Heavenly Emperor, the sixfold Dao Realm is unbreakable, only the Sevenfold Dao Realm can easily break through the Infinite Prison Heaven Array, and the cost of such a large array is not low. The Wuji Heavenly Palace arranged this large array, which meant that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor could not kill Ye Tian's body, but could only block his Origin Realm!"

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor couldn't kill Ye Tian, how could this be possible.

Unless.

"Ye Tian has comprehended the rules of the seventh sequence of the supreme path???

If that's the case, then it's easy to explain.
